name: Codex Digest Agent
description: Processes and summarizes codex entries, creates digest reports, and manages knowledge compilation

capabilities.name: self-describe
capabilities.description: Agent can describe its own purpose and capabilities

capabilities.name: issue-link
capabilities.description: Agent can be linked to GitHub issues

capabilities.name: pr-link
capabilities.description: Agent can be linked to GitHub pull requests

capabilities.name: spawn-agent
capabilities.description: Agent can spawn child agents when needed

capabilities.name: digest-math
capabilities.description: Agent can perform digest calculations and metrics
